content: Mobile exit-intent has no cursor-leave signal (desktop's primary technique), so it composites 4 weaker proxies: popstate/back-button press, fast upward scroll velocity (~200px/s or 15px/frame), inactivity timer (20-30s no taps/scroll), and app/tab blur. Best practice combines 2+ signals (e.g. past-avg-scroll-depth AND idle) rather than firing on one alone, since each individual mobile signal is noisier than desktop mouse-exit tracking.
